response.justification: Wei Chen is a highly skilled Staff/Senior engineer with over 15 years of experience across web, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure domains. While the technical stack partially aligns — TypeScript, React, AWS, Kubernetes, Node.js — this candidate is severely overqualified for a junior/mid-level individual contributor role. The seniority gap creates near-certain risks of salary mismatch, rapid disengagement, and short tenure. There is also no explicit PostgreSQL experience, and Nest.js is absent from the profile. Screening this candidate for this specific role would likely be a poor use of both parties' time.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and Node.js experience across multiple production environments including high-throughput systems
Demonstrated fullstack breadth: React frontend, REST/GraphQL APIs, cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), and CI/CD pipelines
AI/LLM tooling experience at re:cinq with MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure aligns with nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Severe overqualification: 15+ years at Staff/Senior level makes this a junior/mid role fundamentally misaligned with career trajectory and likely compensation expectations
No PostgreSQL experience explicitly mentioned; databases listed are MongoDB, MySQL, and generic SQL — the role's preferred stack is partially unmet
No Nest.js exposure visible in the resume, and React experience is limited to one role at Optilyz with no depth described
